headline: CDL’s $2.29 annual dividend beats Treasury yields despite rising interest rates
summary: Income investors holding the VictoryShares US Large Cap High Div Volatility Wtd ETF (NYSEARCA:CDL) own a fund built around one premise: large American companies with stable share prices tend to pay reliable dividends. CDL distributes cash monthly and paid $2.29 per share in 2025 against a current share price of roughly $76. With Treasury yields ... headline: Why American Electric Power (AEP) Is Up 5.1% After $2.6 Billion Follow-On Equity Offering – And What's Next
summary: Earlier in May 2026, American Electric Power Company completed a US$2.60 billion follow-on equity offering of 20,472,442 common shares at US$127 each, reflecting a per-share discount of US$2.03. This sizeable capital raise strengthens AEP’s funding capacity for grid investments and potential nuclear and transmission projects that are reshaping its business mix. Next, we’ll examine how this large equity raise, and the grid and nuclear projects it supports, affect AEP’s existing investment...
